  • Uses of QueryTemplate in st.orm.core.template

    Subinterfaces of QueryTemplate in st.orm.core.template
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ORMTemplate
    The ORMTemplate is the primary interface that extends the QueryTemplate and RepositoryLooking interfaces, providing access to both the SQL Template engine and ORM logic.

    void

    void

    Deletes a joined entity by primary key from all extension and base tables.
